The '''Krath command station''' was an ancient military [[Space station/Legends|command station]] in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]].

==Characteristics==
The station had a command center where the commanders would direct their fighter and troop transport forces. Near the command center was a chamber where [[Aleema Keto]] focused her [[The Force/Legends|Force]] powers to create elaborate illusions in combat.

The station was capable of carrying dozens of [[Tetan Assault Ship]]s and [[CX-133 Chaos fighter|Chaos fighters]].

==History==
This command station had been built long before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] began.

The [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] used the station in their subjugation of [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] and later [[Battle of Koros Major|fought]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] task force, using it as a command center for their defense.

==Behind the scenes==
The Krath command station appeared in the [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|second]] issue of [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith|''Dark Lords of the Sith'']] story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]]. The issue was published in [[1994]] and was written by [[Tom Veitch]] and [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and penciled by [[Chris Gossett]].<ref name="TotJ" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]] {{1st}}
